case_title: TERAH B. ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU VS. MAUREEN T. MORESCO et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T. MORESCO, RONALD G. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B. AS TO DEFENDANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T. MORESCO, RONALD G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MORESCO, RONALD G.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-12-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SAM LAU. FILED BY ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B. MORESCO, MAUREEN T. MORESCO, RONALD G.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MORESCO, MAUREEN T. MORESCO, RONALD G. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-12-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RONALD G. MORESCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 AT 10:00AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED AUG-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AS DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROVIDE RECEIPTS OF REPAIRS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(G). JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT MAUREEN MORESCO ONLY. RONALD MORESCO TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T. MORESCO, RONALD G. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ARRINGTON-NIKOLAU, TERAH B. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,620.00, JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINTI IN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MORESCO, MAUREEN T.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
